input_lock.message: Deep interview is active; auto-approval shortcuts are blocked until the interview finishes.

task_description: Clarify new scope branch for menu/dict SQL default behavior and naming-rule changes after frontend alignment.
initial_idea: 继续改 菜单/字典 SQL 默认行为、命名规则
known_facts: write-to-database currently depends on apply_menu_to_database plus mode=auto
backend business naming comes from derive_business_name
frontend path naming comes from build_frontend_business_path
supersedes: previous frontend-only scope for this branch

rounds.question: 这次重新放回范围的 SQL 默认行为和命名规则到底是什么
rounds.answer: SQL 默认行为 = 默认生成菜单/字典迁移 SQL，是否执行到数据库由显式配置控制；命名规则 = 仍然以原 Java codegen 规则优先

rounds.question: 这次只改代码逻辑，还是连测试/README一起同步
rounds.answer: C，代码逻辑 + 测试 + README 一起同步

rounds.question: 是否新增高优先级工作区配置控制数据库执行
rounds.answer: B，新增配置项，配置优先度最高

final_scope: 新增一个总开关配置项控制菜单/字典 SQL 是否允许执行到数据库；默认仍生成迁移 SQL；移除 apply_menu_to_database 工具参数逻辑；命名规则继续以原 Java codegen 规则优先；同步代码、测试、README。
